name: One Bowl Devil Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift cake flour, sugar, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt into a large mixing bowl.
2. Add shortening, half the buttermilk, eggs, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Mix in the remaining buttermilk and melted chocolate. Beat an additional 2 minutes.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9x13-inch cake pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-50 minutes.
6. Allow to cool in the pan.
